Title: Modern Steel™ Ultra-Grain<sup class='symbolstxt'>®</sup> Plank
ShortDescription: Rustic meets modern on this unique flush panel Modern Steel door design featuring digitally printed horizontal planks with a stained wood-look appearance
Overview:
Built for Modern Style and Everyday Ease

Durable 3-Layer Construction

The Modern Steel™ Ultra-Grain® Plank door is built from heavy-duty steel, high-performance insulation, and a rugged, low-maintenance exterior for lasting strength and security.

Warm Wood Look

Get the rich, textured appearance of real wood with digitally printed Ultra-Grain® Plank finishes—no staining, painting, or upkeep required.

Custom Finishes & Windows

Choose from six unique Ultra-Grain® Plank colors and mix in contemporary window options, including short, long, or slim glass panels that can be placed exactly how you want them.

Superior Insulation

With 2" Intellicore® polyurethane foam and an impressive 18.4 R-value, this door keeps your garage quiet and more comfortable all year long.

WindCode® Reinforcement

Optional wind load upgrades help protect your door in extreme weather, so you can feel confident in any climate.

Environmental Assurance

Clopay doors are compliant with environmental laws and regulations. Clopay doors do not contain HFCs. All Clopay doors are compliant with:

  • California SB 1013
  • Washington HB 1112 – Hydrofluorocarbon Greenhouse Gas Emissions
  • Canadian regulations amending the ozone-depleting substances and halocarbon alternatives regulations
  • New Jersey A-5583/S-3919 – Greenhouse Gas Bill
  • 2" thick polystyrene doors and all Intellicore® insulation doors comply with 2015 IECC air infiltration requirement of 0.40 cfm/ft2 or less (IECC, Section C402.5.2).
Construction:
How It’s Made: Modern Steel™ Ultra-Grain® Plank

The Modern Steel™ Ultra-Grain® Plank door is designed to deliver serious performance with everyday convenience. Each door features a robust three-layer construction: a tough steel exterior, 2 inches of Clopay’s proprietary Intellicore® polyurethane foam insulation, and a strong steel backing. This insulation process fills every inch of the door, giving it outstanding strength and helps regulate the temperature inside the garage.

Tongue-and-groove section joints help keep out wind, rain, and snow, while a replaceable vinyl bottom seal in a corrosion-resistant aluminum retainer keeps dust and moisture at bay. Heavy-duty 14-gauge steel hinges and smooth 10-ball nylon rollers come standard for reliable, quiet operation.

Built for durability, the door resists rust and dents, and special features like the patented Safe-T-Bracket® and sturdy step plates make operation both safe and easy. Even window grilles are removable for easy cleaning.

  1. Steel
  2. Intellicore® Polyurethane
  3. Steel
ColorDisclaimer: The Modern Steel™ Ultra-Grain® Plank door comes in a curated palette of six rich, wood-inspired finishes: Kona, Coastal Gray, Espresso, Barnwood, Natural, and Cedar. Each finish is digitally printed to capture the authentic look and texture of real wood, with unique graining that never repeats. From the deep, warm tones of Kona and Espresso to the cool, modern vibe of Coastal Gray or the rustic appeal of Barnwood and Cedar, there’s a color to fit every style of home. These exclusive Ultra-Grain® Plank finishes are designed to enhance the door’s precise lines and add standout curb appeal, all without the maintenance a wood door would require.
TopSectionDisclaimer:
There are a number of ways to use windows and the top section to personalize your Modern Steel™ Ultra-Grain® Plank door. Be flashy with contemporary slim windows in silver or black for a sleek look which with a modern edge. If you want something more timeless, choose from plain short or long architectural series windows, which add light and style without overpowering your door’s natural wood appearance. All windows use durable acrylic, and you can mix and match placements to let in as much, or as little, light as you want.

*Acrylic window designs.
***Contemporary Slim windows available on 2" thick models only. See dealer for availability.
DesignDisclaimer:
*Only available with Architectural Series Windows.
